query: SELECT id, hostName, bio, activities, otherNotes, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved' AND (hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR hostName LIKE '%Norika%' OR hostName LIKE '%Steven%' OR (hostName LIKE '%Grace%' AND cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%'));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, bio, activities, otherNotes, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved' AND (hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR hostName LIKE '%Norika%' OR hostName LIKE '%Steven%' OR (hostName LIKE '%Grace%' AND cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%'));

rows.bio: Hi! We are avid travelers who have been to more than 60 countries, and just set our foot on all seven continents on earth! (Antarctica is a great honeymoon location :). We love hosting friends and have some nice chats over Chinese dinner. Cultural exchange is what I have been doing in life - I have lived in four continents (Shanghai, Copenhagen, Nairobi and Chicago). Come and enjoy a nice meal and good conversations!

Chuan's culinary journey began in childhood when she couldn't find delicious, lightly-oiled stir-fried eggplant in restaurants, so she decided to cook herself. Her passion for home cooking was ignited from that moment. Her philosophy of "eating well" means nutritious, balanced meals with clean flavors and authentic taste. Her dishes blend ingredients and flavors from Guangxi, Guangdong, and Southeast Asia.
